name: otp-ai
description: Generate and verify TOTP/HOTP one-time passwords with RFC 4226/6238 compliance. By MEOK AI Labs.

tools.name: generate_otp
tools.description: Generate a one-time password from a base32 secret. Supports TOTP (time-based) and HOTP (counter-based).

tools.name: verify_otp
tools.description: Verify a one-time password against a secret. Window parameter allows for clock drift (TOTP) or counter desync (HOTP).

tools.name: generate_secret
tools.description: Generate a cryptographically secure random secret for OTP. Returns base32-encoded secret.

tools.name: get_qr_uri
tools.description: Generate an otpauth:// URI for QR code provisioning compatible with Google Authenticator, Authy, etc.
